description_long: This object is a large, low-rise school complex with multiple interconnected rectangular buildings arranged on a flat base. The main structures are white and feature numerous windows, suggesting classrooms and administrative areas. Two adjacent red tennis courts are clearly visible, indicating outdoor recreational facilities. The layout includes a central courtyard or open area, and there are smaller structures that could represent entrances or utility rooms. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility. The site is expansive, likely accommodating a significant number of students and staff.
description: A modern, sprawling school complex with white buildings and two red tennis courts, featuring multiple windows and open areas.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main school buildings with two red tennis courts on the left side and a clear view of the building's facade.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the complex, with the tennis courts and building structures extending back across the base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the school buildings and the tennis courts on the right, with smaller structures visible in the center.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the tennis courts in the foreground and the elongated side of the main building behind them.
